props.name: as
props.description: Component used for the root node. Either a string to use a HTML element or a component.

props.name: color
props.description: Sets the color context of the component to one of CoreUI’s themed colors.

props.name: caret
props.description: Enables pseudo element caret on toggler.

props.name: custom
props.description: Create a custom toggler which accepts any content.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Toggle the disabled state for the component.

props.name: navLink
props.description: If a dropdown `variant` is set to `nav-item` then render the toggler as a link instead of a button.

props.name: size
props.description: Size the component small or large.

props.name: split
props.description: Similarly, create split button dropdowns with virtually the same markup as single button dropdowns, but with the addition of `.dropdown-toggle-split` className for proper spacing around the dropdown caret.

props.name: splitLabel
props.description: Screen reader label for split button dropdown toggle.

props.name: trigger
props.description: Sets which event handlers you’d like provided to your toggle prop. You can specify one trigger or an array of them.

props.name: variant
props.description: Set the button variant to an outlined button or a ghost button.
